title: Griffiths phase–like behavior in nearly half-metallic CoFeVAl: Theory and experiment

paper_analysis.summary: The paper combines experiments and first-principles calculations to study magnetic, transport, and electronic properties of the Heusler alloy CoFeVAl, revealing Griffiths phase-like behavior and nearly half-metallic ferromagnetism.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to rely on experimental measurements and first-principles calculations, but no downloadable dataset or data repository was identified from the available information.
